entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -

[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.170391. - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\UAMY_instance_2024_2025.xml
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0155.10072 - 11:40:37.838851 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\UAMY_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\UAMY_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\UAMY_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0155.10072] The filer has reported a value for the effect of exchange on cash and cash equivalents and has used the element CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffect. However the fiing does not include a calculation showing the value of the impact of exchange rates flowing into this element. If the element represents the total before exchange rate adjustments then the element CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffect should be used.
Rule Element Id:10072 Rule version: 29.0.2 - UAMY_instance_2024_2025.xml 2502
[xule.ruleEvalTime] DQC.US.0155.10072 time took: 2.753791 - 11:40:40.592951 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\UAMY_instance_2024_2025.xml
[xule.ruleEvalTime] Total number of rules processed: 1 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\UAMY_instance_2024_2025.xml
[xule.ruleEvalTime] Number of rules over 0.005s: 1 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\UAMY_instance_2024_2025.xml
